projectDescription: AI-powered project plan and PRD generator for developers

phases.description: Setup backend infrastructure, database, and core architecture

tasks.description: Initialize Node.js + TypeScript + Express backend with proper folder structure
details: Create backend folder structure: src/(routes, controllers, services, models, utils, config)
Setup package.json with dependencies: express, typescript, cors, helmet, dotenv, mongoose, bcrypt, jsonwebtoken
acceptanceCriteria: Health check endpoint responds at GET /api/health

tasks.description: Setup environment variables and configuration management
details: Create .env file with: NODE_ENV, PORT, DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, CORS_ORIGIN, ENCRYPTION_KEY
Create config loader utility in src/config
acceptanceCriteria: Application fails gracefully if required vars missing

tasks.description: Setup MongoDB connection with Mongoose
details: Create database connection module in src/config/database.ts
Implement connection error handling and retry logic
acceptanceCriteria: Connection status endpoint returns DB health

tasks.description: Implement RESTful API architecture with versioning
Implement centralized error handling system
details: Create custom AppError class with statusCode
Create catchAsync wrapper for async routes
acceptanceCriteria: All errors caught and handled consistently
Development shows stack trace, production shows friendly messages

phases.description: Complete user authentication with JWT and security features

tasks.description: Design and implement User model with all required fields
details: Fields: email (unique, indexed), password (hashed), name, role (enum), isActive, emailVerified, lastLogin, timestamps
acceptanceCriteria: User model created with all fields

tasks.description: Implement secure password hashing with bcrypt
details: Hash passwords with 12 salt rounds before saving
Never return password in API responses
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special char enforced

tasks.description: Implement signup, login, refresh token, and logout endpoints
details: POST /api/v1/auth/signup - validate, create user, generate tokens

tasks.description: Create JWT authentication middleware for protected routes
details: Extract and verify JWT from Authorization header
Decode user ID and attach to req.user
Handle token expiration and invalid tokens

tasks.description: Implement email verification flow
details: Add verificationToken and emailVerified to User schema
Create email templates (can use console.log for now)

tasks.description: Implement forgot password and reset password functionality
details: POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password - validate token and update password
Add resetToken and resetTokenExpiry to User schema

phases.description: Implement core plan and PRD generation functionality

tasks.description: Design and implement Plan model for storing generated plans
details: Fields: userId (ref to User), ideaText, generatedPlan (JSON), status (enum: pending, completed, failed), visibility, isDeleted, timestamps
Add indexes on userId, createdAt, status
Create cascade rules on user delete
acceptanceCriteria: Plan model created with all fields

tasks.description: Implement secure API key storage and management
details: Create APIKey schema: userId, encryptedKey, keyType, status, usageStats
POST /api/v1/api-keys - add new key (encrypt before save)
GET /api/v1/api-keys - retrieve keys (show last 4 chars only)
acceptanceCriteria: Only last 4 characters shown to user

tasks.description: Create service to interact with Gemini API
details: Implement promptBuilder utility for plan generation
Implement API call with user's decrypted key
Add retry logic for failed requests
Handle rate limiting and quota errors

tasks.description: Implement POST /api/v1/plans endpoint for plan creation
details: Validate user has active API key
Accept ideaText in request body (max 5000 chars)
Create Plan record with status: pending
Call Gemini service to generate plan
Update Plan with generated content or error
Return Plan with ID and generated content
Rate limit: 10 requests per hour per user

tasks.description: Implement GET, UPDATE, DELETE operations for plans
details: GET /api/v1/plans - list user's plans with pagination

phases.description: Implement PRD generation and document export functionality

tasks.description: Design and implement PRD model
details: Fields: userId, planId (ref to Plan), content (JSON), version, metadata (wordCount, generationDuration), timestamps
acceptanceCriteria: PRD model created with all fields

tasks.description: Create service to generate PRD from plan
details: Build PRD-specific prompt using plan content
Call Gemini API with PRD generation instructions
Structure response into PRD sections: vision, user stories, functional requirements, technical architecture, etc.
acceptanceCriteria: PRD generated with all standard sections

tasks.description: Implement POST /api/v1/plans/:id/generate-prd
details: Call PRD service with plan content

tasks.description: Implement GET operations for PRDs
details: GET /api/v1/prds - list user's PRDs with pagination
Include related plan data in response

tasks.description: Implement PDF and Markdown export for plans and PRDs
details: Install puppeteer or pdfkit for PDF generation
Install marked or similar for Markdown
Format content appropriately for each format
Add table of contents for PDF

phases.description: Implement user profile management and dashboard

tasks.description: Implement user profile CRUD operations
Create endpoint for dashboard statistics
Implement search for plans and PRDs
details: Create text indexes on Plan.ideaText and PRD.content

tasks.description: Add advanced filtering and sorting to list endpoints
details: Add query params: status, sortBy, order to plans endpoint
Implement sorting on: createdAt, updatedAt, ideaText
acceptanceCriteria: Sorting works on all specified fields

tasks.description: Setup Axios and API configuration in frontend
details: Setup axios interceptors for auth token injection

tasks.description: Connect frontend auth pages to backend
details: Implement signup, login, logout, refresh token functions
Store tokens in localStorage or httpOnly cookies
Create useAuth hook for auth state management

tasks.description: Connect plan generation UI to backend
acceptanceCriteria: Loading states show during API call

tasks.description: Connect PRD generation UI to backend
acceptanceCriteria: PRD generation triggered from plan view

tasks.description: Connect profile and API key management UI to backend
details: Add password change form with validation
acceptanceCriteria: Test button verifies API key validity

tasks.description: Implement search and filtering in frontend
details: Connect filters to API query params

phases.description: Enhance UX with loading states, error handling, and performance improvements

tasks.description: Implement comprehensive loading indicators
details: Add skeleton screens for list views
Show spinners on buttons during submission
Add progress indicators for plan generation
Use React Suspense for code splitting
Ensure no layout shift during loading
acceptanceCriteria: All async operations show loading state
Skeleton screens match final content layout

tasks.description: Implement user-friendly error handling and notifications
details: Add toast notifications for all actions
Implement error boundaries for React errors
Add retry mechanisms for failed operations
acceptanceCriteria: Success toasts appear with green checkmark

tasks.description: Design and implement empty state components
details: Design empty state for no plans
Design empty state for no PRDs
Design empty state for search with no results
Add appropriate CTAs in empty states
acceptanceCriteria: Clear messaging about what to do next

tasks.description: Ensure all pages work well on mobile devices
details: Test all pages on mobile breakpoints
Convert sidebar to bottom nav on mobile
Stack layouts vertically on small screens
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation accessible on all screen sizes

tasks.description: Optimize frontend and backend performance
Add dark mode support throughout application
details: Configure Tailwind dark mode with class strategy
Add theme toggle button in header
Style all components for dark mode
Detect system preference on first load
acceptanceCriteria: All components styled for both modes
Good contrast ratios in both modes

tasks.description: Write unit tests for backend services
details: Write tests for auth service (password hashing, comparison)
Write tests for plan service (generation, CRUD)

tasks.description: Write integration tests for API endpoints
details: Write tests for auth endpoints (signup, login, refresh)
Write tests for plan endpoints (create, read, update, delete)
Test error scenarios and edge cases
acceptanceCriteria: All API endpoints have integration tests
Both success and error cases covered

tasks.description: Write tests for React components
details: Write tests for plan generation components
acceptanceCriteria: Tests focus on behavior not implementation

tasks.description: Write E2E tests for critical user flows
details: Write E2E test for signup flow
Write E2E test for login flow
Write E2E test for plan generation flow
Write E2E test for PRD generation flow
Run tests in headless mode for CI
acceptanceCriteria: Critical user flows have E2E tests
Tests cover happy path and key error scenarios

tasks.description: Perform security testing and hardening
details: Run npm audit and fix vulnerabilities

phases.description: Deploy application to production and launch

tasks.description: Deploy backend to Railway or Render
details: Configure CORS for production frontend URL

tasks.description: Deploy frontend to Vercel
details: Add environment variable: VITE_API_URL (production backend URL)

tasks.description: Setup production database and backup strategy
details: Enable automatic backups in MongoDB Atlas

tasks.description: Setup error tracking and monitoring
details: Setup Sentry for error tracking (backend and frontend)

tasks.description: Setup automated deployment pipeline
details: Add steps: install, lint, test, build
Configure automatic deployment on main branch push
Configure status checks required for merge
acceptanceCriteria: CI/CD pipeline runs on every push

tasks.description: Final checks before launch
details: Verify all environment variables set correctly
Test complete user flows in production
Check HTTPS enabled on both frontend and backend
Test on multiple devices and browsers

phases.description: Monitor, gather feedback, and iterate on the product

tasks.description: Setup mechanisms to collect user feedback
Monitor and optimize application performance
Address bugs and maintain application health
details: Fix high priority bugs within 1 week

tasks.description: Plan and implement new features based on feedback

security: Implement rate limiting on all public endpoints
performance: Add database indexes on frequently queried fields
Implement pagination on all list endpoints
Cache Gemini API responses when appropriate
userExperience: Show loading states for all async operations
Add keyboard shortcuts for power users
